text.title: Python Ecosystem Practices Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for practices-python-ecosystem.

conclusion.verdict: ship py.typed marker + mypy --strict on the whole package
skip py.typed but still ship pyproject + src/ layout
uv.lock committed; deploy installs from lock; no floating versions
still wire pyproject.toml + ruff + mypy + pre-commit even without distribution

text.example: type=library_shipped_to_pypi → typed=true → py.typed + mypy --strict + ruff + uv.lock + pre-commit. Rule: mypy-strict.
